name_cn:
Batch, 〖Original Box〗🎉Vintage Mini Crossbody Bag🎉🎉🎉1BD622🎉🎉
This Vintage chain quilted crossbody bag design is amazing 👏👏
Pure handmade nylon quilted design, crossbody + shoulder strap, imported black gold chain pairing is truly a Vintage classic 😘😘 Simple and elegant, large capacity 👆 Very trendy when worn, versatile and chic. Whether casual or formal, it exudes a steady temperament. Get yours now 🙊 I love this Vintage crossbody bag 😘😘
18x16x5cm
